focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】Meta rolls out Muse, a new AI image generator
【金融新闻】亲子研学、亲子康养……暑期到来，亲子消费迅速升温
【中国新闻】文化和旅游部印发《旅游强国建设“十五五”规划》
【世界新闻】US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Meta rolls out Muse, a new AI image generator
items.summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.

items.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
items.summary: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

items.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
items.summary: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.

items.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
items.summary: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and

items.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
items.summary: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is clo

items.title: 亲子研学、亲子康养……暑期到来，亲子消费迅速升温
items.summary: 暑期消费升温 共赴亲情时光(新视窗·聚焦暑期消费)

items.title: 世界杯带热哪些消费？
items.summary: 当前，2026年国际足联世界杯正如火如荼地进行。观察身边，世界杯的元素无处不在：电梯广告滚动播报当日的最新战况，商场大屏的直播赛事吸引着往来顾客，街头行人的装扮里球衣、吉祥物包挂等成为常见穿搭……

items.title: Bank of America warns America now has 2 economies
items.summary: （该来源未提供摘要，请点击查看原文）

items.title: 港交所上半年IPO集资额同比增长92%
items.summary: 中新社香港7月7日电 香港交易及结算所有限公司(简称“港交所”)7日发布公告，今年上半年首次公开招股(IPO)集资金额为2102亿港元，较去年同期的1094亿港元上升92%。

items.title: “定西宽粉”书写黄土高原现代农业的“宽”与“广”
items.summary: 中新网甘肃渭源7月7日电 (杨娜)“甘味出陇”系列新闻发布活动“定西宽粉”专场7日在渭水源头甘肃省定西市渭源县举行。

items.title: 文化和旅游部印发《旅游强国建设“十五五”规划》
items.summary: 为深入贯彻习近平总书记对旅游工作的重要指示精神，落实全国旅游发展大会和《中华人民共和国国民经济和社会发展第十五个五年规划纲要》部署，经国务院批复同意，文化和旅游部近日印发《旅游强国建设“十五五”规划》(以下简称《规划》)。

items.title: 袭击发生之际，伊朗谴责美国重施石油制裁
items.summary: 中新网7月8日电 据美国有线电视新闻网(CNN)报道，伊朗谴责美国重新对德黑兰实施石油制裁，称其“明显违反”了两国2026年6月达成的谅解备忘录。

items.title: 外媒：伊朗南部港口城市发生爆炸
items.summary: 中新网7月8日电 据美国有线电视新闻网(CNN)报道，伊朗媒体消息称，伊朗港口城市阿巴斯港和锡里克以及格什姆岛都听到了数次爆炸声。

items.title: 美军称为报复伊朗袭击商船，对伊朗发动系列打击
items.summary: 中新网7月8日电 据美国消费者新闻与商业频道(CNBC)报道，美国中央司令部表示，为报复伊朗袭击三艘途经霍尔木兹海峡的商船，美国于7日对伊朗发动了一系列“有力打击” 。

items.title: 美官员称对伊朗打击是“惩罚” 不是对等回应
items.summary: 当地时间7月7日，总台记者获悉，一名美国官员表示，美国正在对伊朗境内目标实施的军事打击“不是对等回应”，而是对伊朗近期在霍尔木兹海峡附近袭击货船作出的回应。

items.title: US launches strikes on Iran after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The US says the strikes are intended to impose "heavy costs", while Iran warns it will "take decisive measures" in response.

items.title: Watch: Marine Le Pen confirms run for French presidency
items.summary: The National Rally leader also said she will attempt to appeal an embezzlement conviction.

items.title: New video shows man believed to be Tyler Robinson before Charlie Kirk shooting
items.summary: The footage shown during the second day of a preliminary hearing appears to show Robinson walking through a parking garage and running across a roof.

items.title: New footage shown at Kirk hearing shows man on rooftop near shooting scene
items.summary: The preliminary hearing will determine whether Tyler Robinson, accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk, will stand trial.

items.title: Marine Le Pen to run for French presidency and appeal conviction in top court
items.summary: The hard-right National Rally leader has ended months of speculation, after a court ruled she could run but would have to wear a tag for a year.

items.summary: autonomous red teaming platform; multi-agent offensive-security meta-harness

items.summary: The open-source AI workbench for scientific research

items.title: ammaarreshi/Generals-Mac-iOS-iPad（⭐ 1284）
items.summary: Command & Conquer Generals: Zero Hour running natively on macOS, iPhone & iPad — real engine (EA GPL v3 source, via GeneralsX), DXVK/MoltenVK renderer, RTS touch controls. No game assets included.

items.title: jamesob/local-llm（⭐ 1172）
items.summary: Everything I know about running LLMs locally

items.title: MaximeRivest/riddle（⭐ 1037）
items.summary: The diary of Tom Riddle for the reMarkable Paper Pro — write with your pen, the page drinks your ink and answers in a flowing hand
